Syllabus Spring 2024

Lesson Date Topic Reading Worksheets
1 3/4/2026 Basic Electricity: Introduction / Electricity and Magnatism Review Part 1
2 3/6/2026 Basic Electricity: Current / Voltage / Energy and Power / Resistors Review Part 2
3 3/9/2026 Basic Electricity: Ohm's Law / Voltage Sources / Current Sources / Switches / Simple Circuits Parallel Series Analysis
4 3/11/2026 Basic Electricity: Capacitors / Inductors / Nonlinear Voltage and Current Sources / Safety Wheatstone Bridge
5 3/13/2026 Resistor Networks: Conductance / Kirchhoff's Voltage Law
6 3/16/2026 Resistor Networks: Series and Parallel / Voltage Divider Grounds and Commons
7 3/18/2026 Resistor Networks: Kirchhoff's Current Law / Current divider Superposition
8 3/20/2026 Quiz 1 Node Mesh
9 3/23/2026 Resistor Networks: Parallel Series Analysis / Additional Topics
10 2/25/2026 Resistor Networks: Parallel Series Analysis / Additional Topics Transfer Functions
11 3/27/2026 Network Analysis: Superposition and Linearity
12 3/30/2026 Network Analysis: Node Analysis / Mesh Analysis Complex Numbers
13 4/1/2026 Network Analysis: Node Analysis / Mesh Analysis Complex Impedance
14 4/3/2026 Network Analysis: Thevenin Equivalent / Norton Equivalent / Source Transformations AC Analysis Part 1
15 4/6/2026 Network Analysis: Thevenin Equivalent / Norton Equivalent / Source Transformations AC Analysis Part 2
16 4/8/2026 Network Analysis: Thevenin Equivalent / Norton Equivalent / Source Transformations Resonance
17 4/10/2026 Quiz 2 Filters
18 4/13/2026 Semester Summary: WSB Temperature Sensor / After Exam 1 FRF
19 4/15/2026 Exam 1 Review
20 4/22/2026 Exam 1
21 4/24/2026 Frequency - Domain Analysis: Sinusoidal Steady State / Complex numbers / Euler's formula Transistors
22 4/27/2026 Frequency - Domain Analysis: Resistor, Capcitor, and Inductor Impedance Op Amps Introduction
23 4/29/2026 Frequency - Domain Analysis: Resistor, Capcitor, and Inductor Impedance
24 5/1/2026 Frequency - Domain Analysis: Admittance / First - Order Frequency Response Equation Building 1
25 5/4/2026 Frequency - Domain Analysis: Phasors / RMS Voltages and Currents Equation Building 2
26 5/6/2026 Quiz 3 Signal Conditioning
27 5/8/2026 Frequency - Domain Analysis: Reactive Power / Complex Power / Power Factor Correction
28 5/11/2026 Op - Amps: Ideal Op - Amps / Feedback Logic Gates: Intro
29 5/13/2026 Op - Amps: Inverting Amplifier / Noninverting Amplifier / Integrator and Differentiator Logic Gates: Application
30 5/15/2026 Op - Amps: Practical Op - Amps
31 5/18/2026 Op - Amps: Multiple Op - Amp Circuits
32 5/20/2026 Quiz 4
33 5/22/2026 Combinational Logic: Electronics and Digital Systems / Gates
34 5/26/2026 Combinational Logic: Boolean Algebra and Equations
35 5/27/2026 Combinational Logic: Equations to/from Circuits
36 5/29/2026 Combinational Logic: Two - Level Combinational Logic Simplification
37 6/1/2026 Combinational Logic: Demorgan's Law 12.1 - 12.1.2
38 6/3/2026 Exam 2 Review 12.1.3, 12.2.1
39 6/5/2026 Exam 2
40 6/8/2026 Final Review
